description: Concrete Stage 2 8xH100 run matrix built on public record baselines and internal derivative winners.

slots.name: training_opt_seq4096_trunk
slots.why: Exact replay of the strongest clean public training-side baseline.
slots.validates: The branch and hardware can reproduce the clean seq4096 public trunk.
slots.falsifies: The current substrate cannot even reproduce the trunk cleanly.
notes: Primary comparison target: public TrainingOptSeq4096 record at 1.20143417.
Read this run with fixed-chunk eval first.

slots.name: trunk_plus_sliding_eval64
slots.why: Tests whether the clean training trunk still has eval-only headroom.
slots.validates: Sliding eval materially improves the seq4096 trunk.
slots.falsifies: Sliding eval gives too little gain or too much eval cost.
notes: This slot is still useful even if it is not submission-legal as the final default.

slots.name: trunk_plus_fp16_embed_export
slots.why: Tests whether the cleanest public export trick transfers to the seq4096 trunk.
slots.validates: Embedding precision is still a first-order export bottleneck.
slots.falsifies: The size trade is not worth it on the seq4096 trunk.
notes: Use if bytes remain legal after export.

slots.name: trunk_plus_quant_quality
slots.why: Direct transfer test for our strongest A100 quant-fidelity winner.

slots.name: trunk_fp16_embed_plus_muon_wd
slots.why: Tests whether the public top-2 Muon WD claim transfers without also requiring depth/init changes.
slots.validates: Muon WD helps final score or shrinks quant gap on the strong trunk.
slots.falsifies: No real gain over the simpler fp16-export stack.

slots.name: trunk_fp16_embed_muon_wd_plus_overtone
slots.why: Tests overtone/spectral init plus phase-structured residual mixing on top of a strong trunk.
slots.validates: The public init story is portable to our path.
slots.falsifies: The earlier curve and final score are flat.
notes: Requires code support not yet present in repo train_gpt.py.

slots.name: trunk_fp16_embed_plus_adaptive_muon
slots.why: Tests whether lower step cost can buy enough extra updates to improve the strong trunk.
slots.validates: step_avg drops, steps reached rises, and score improves or holds.
slots.falsifies: step_avg barely changes or the score regresses again.

slots.name: record_like_2048_int6_plus_adaptive_muon
slots.why: Tests whether our adaptive-Muon winner is a derivative improvement on top of a record-like public stack.
slots.validates: The hybrid beats the simpler record-like branch or improves step efficiency materially.
slots.falsifies: No improvement over the public-style branch.
notes: Derivative hybrid of record baseline plus our throughput winner.
This is the strongest record-plus-our-winner test in the matrix.

slots.name: depth10_supported_stack
slots.why: Fairly tests the 10-layer story only after the public support stack is present.
slots.validates: 10L only failed earlier because it lacked the supporting recipe.

slots.name: warmdown_revisit_branch
slots.why: Resolves the biggest disagreement between Stage 1 proxy results and public 8xH100 reports.
slots.validates: The schedule branch improves final score once tested on real 8xH100.
slots.falsifies: It is still unstable or clearly worse.
notes: Intentionally conservative relative to the catastrophic A100 branch.
